# Cosmin-Gabriel Popa — Academic Profile

> Senior Lecturer (Șef de Lucrări) at the Department of Anatomy and Embryology, University of Medicine and Pharmacy "Gr. T. Popa" Iași, Romania. Teaching since 2014.

## About

Cosmin-Gabriel Popa is a faculty member specializing in applied anatomy and digital medical education. He holds dual degrees in Dental Medicine (UMF Gr. T. Popa Iași) and History (Al. I. Cuza University Iași). He is a member of the Romanian Society of Anatomy and a recipient of the IADS "Peter Swiss" Excellence Award.

## Research Areas

- Applied Anatomy: Clinical anatomy with relevance to dental, surgical, and imaging practice
- Digital Medical Education: Development of digital tools for teaching anatomy

## Teaching

- Human Anatomy (Year I & II — Medicine, Dental Medicine)
- Embryology (Year I — Medicine, Dental Medicine)
- Faculty: UMF "Gr. T. Popa" Iași, Department of Anatomy and Embryology

## Digital Projects

- NASCORA (https://nascora.health): Bilingual teratology prevention platform with 500+ substance database
- Medical Research Toolkit: Unified search across PubMed, Google Scholar, Semantic Scholar, Consensus

## Identifiers

- ORCID: 0000-0002-7124-3179 (https://orcid.org/0000-0002-7124-3179)
- Website: https://cosminpopa.ro
- Email: cosmin.g.popa@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/cosmin-gabriel-popa

## Education

- PhD in Dental Medicine (ongoing) — UMF Gr. T. Popa Iași
- MSc in Dental Medicine (2017) — UMF Gr. T. Popa Iași
- DMD in Dental Medicine (2013) — UMF Gr. T. Popa Iași
- BA in History (2013) — Al. I. Cuza University Iași
